query:
-- Subscription revenue
SELECT 
  plan,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(amountPaid) / 100.0 as revenue_gbp
FROM subscriptions
WHERE status IN ('active','cancelled')
GROUP BY plan;

-- Credit top-up revenue
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as topup_count,
  SUM(amountPaid) / 100.0 as topup_revenue_gbp
FROM topupPurchases
WHERE status = 'completed';

-- Credit consumption (how many credits have been burned on renders)
SELECT 
  type,
  COUNT(*) as count,
  SUM(ABS(amount)) as total_credits
FROM creditTransactions
GROUP BY type
ORDER BY total_credits DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Jobs completed all time
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_jobs,
  SUM(totalScenes) as total_scenes,
  AVG(totalScenes) as avg_scenes_per_job
FROM musicVideoJobs
WHERE status = 'completed';
